complexity_reasons: five business rules (duplicate, split, over-standard, overdue, over-budget)

audit_scope.object: XX证券完整开发库综合费用审计

applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)
XX证券业务招待费管理办法
XX证券办公与通讯费用管理办法

policy_questions.description: 同一员工、同一费用类型7天内≥2笔且合计金额达较高审批线
无专项审批时不超过制度标准1.0倍
费用发生后60天内提交报销
部门年度预算不足时不得继续报销

data_questions: Find invoices used more than once (duplicate reimbursement)
Find same employee, same expense_type within 7-day windows with total >= 3000
Compare lodging amounts against per-night standards by employee level and city tier
Compare business entertainment per-event and per-person against standards
Aggregate office_supplies and communication by employee-month and compare against caps
Compare training fee and training lodging against standards
Calculate reimburse_date - expense_date and find records > 60 days
Calculate department cumulative expenses and compare against annual budgets

execution_steps.name: invoke_data_analyst
execution_steps.action: Invoke native subagent for comprehensive data analysis

execution_steps.name: policy_check
execution_steps.action: Compact policy version check (all policies 2025, no conflict)

context.task: Run comprehensive data analysis on /benchmark/data/expense.db for all five audit rules. Save all SQL queries in work/sql/, results in work/analysis/.

rules.description: Find invoices (invoice_id or invoice_no) used in more than one expense_records record
For each employee + expense_type pair, find records within 7-day windows where count >= 2 and total amount >= 3000 (AR-02 threshold)

Check: (a) travel_lodging: amount/nights vs standard by employee_level + city_tier; (b) training_lodging: amount/nights vs standard by city_tier; (c) training_fee: amount vs 3500/人; (d) business_entertainment: amount vs 5000/次 also amount/participants vs 300/人; (e) office_supplies: sum by employee-month vs 600; (f) communication: sum by employee-month vs 300

For each department, order by expense_date, calculate cumulative spend, identify first record that exceeds annual_budget. Records before crossing are context, first crossing record is anomalous unless special_approval=1

exemptions: special_approval=1 exempts from over_standard and over_budget (per policy clause 12, 13)

stopping_conditions: All candidate records verified against database
